commands.name: horizontal-50-50
commands.title: Horizontal 50 / 50
commands.description: Two windows - 50% width, 100% height.

commands.name: horizontal-70-30
commands.title: Horizontal 70 / 30
commands.description: Two windows - 70% and 30% width, 100% height.

commands.name: horizontal-30-70
commands.title: Horizontal 30 / 70
commands.description: Two windows - 30% and 70% width, 100% height.

commands.name: horizontal-3
commands.title: Horizontal 3 Columns
commands.description: Three windows - 1/3 width and 100% height.

commands.name: horizontal-1-2
commands.title: Horizontal 1 + 2
commands.description: Three windows - first 50% width and 100% height, aligned to the left. Other two 50% width and 50% height, aligned to the right.

commands.name: horizontal-2-1
commands.title: Horizontal 2 + 1
commands.description: Three windows - first 50% width and 100% height, aligned to the right. Other two 50% width and 50% height, aligned to the left.

commands.name: grid
commands.title: Grid of 4
commands.description: Even grid of 4 windows - 50% width and 50% height

commands.name: vertical-50-50
commands.title: Vertical 50 / 50
commands.description: Two windows - 100% width and 50% height.

commands.name: vertical-70-30
commands.title: Vertical 70 / 30
commands.description: Two windows - 100% width, 70% and 30% height.

commands.name: vertical-30-70
commands.title: Vertical 30 / 70
commands.description: Two windows - 100% width, 30% and 70% height.

commands.name: vertical-3
commands.title: Vertical 3 Rows
commands.description: Three windows - 100% width, 1/3 height.

commands.name: vertical-1-2
commands.title: Vertical 1 + 2
commands.description: Three windows - first 100% width and 50% height, aligned to the top. Other two 50% width and 50% height, aligned to the bottom.

commands.name: vertical-2-1
commands.title: Vertical 2 + 1
commands.description: Three windows - first 100% width and 50% height, aligned to the bottom. Other two 50% width and 50% height, aligned to the top.

commands.name: create-custom-layout
commands.title: Create Custom Layout
commands.description: Define a custom window layout using a JSON grid.

commands.name: custom-layouts
commands.title: Custom Layouts
commands.description: Browse and apply your custom window layouts.

commands.name: pick-layout
commands.title: Pick Layout
commands.description: Choose a layout and reorder windows to decide which window goes in which slot.

commands.name: save-layout
commands.title: Save Current Layout
commands.description: Save the current window positions so you can restore them later.

commands.name: restore-layout
commands.title: Restore Saved Layout
commands.description: Restore a previously saved window layout.

commands.name: auto-layout
commands.title: Auto Layout
commands.description: Automatically pick the best layout based on the number of open windows.

commands.name: horizontal-75-25
commands.title: Horizontal 75 / 25
commands.description: Two windows - 75% and 25% width, 100% height.

commands.name: horizontal-25-75
commands.title: Horizontal 25 / 75
commands.description: Two windows - 25% and 75% width, 100% height.

commands.name: vertical-75-25
commands.title: Vertical 75 / 25
commands.description: Two windows - 100% width, 75% and 25% height.

commands.name: vertical-25-75
commands.title: Vertical 25 / 75
commands.description: Two windows - 100% width, 25% and 75% height.

commands.name: grid-6
commands.title: Grid of 6
commands.description: Even grid of 6 windows - 3 columns and 2 rows.

commands.name: grid-3x3
commands.title: Grid of 9
commands.description: Even grid of 9 windows - 3 columns and 3 rows.

commands.name: centered-focus
commands.title: Centered Focus
commands.description: Three windows - large center (60%), two narrow sidebars (20% each).

commands.name: pip
commands.title: Picture in Picture
commands.description: Main window on top (80%), small PiP in the bottom-right corner. With 3 windows, the bottom-left is also filled.

preferences.name: disableToasts
preferences.label: Disable notifications
preferences.title: Disable success notifications
preferences.description: By default, 'Windows arranged' message will briefly show after successful tiling. This option will disable the behavior.

preferences.name: keepWindowOpenAfterTiling
preferences.label: Keep open
preferences.title: Keep Raycast open after tiling
preferences.description: By default, Raycast window will close after tiling is complete. This option will disable the behavior.

preferences.name: excludedApps
preferences.title: Excluded Apps
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of app names to exclude from tiling (e.g. "Finder, Spotify").

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
